steps.title: Use the although contrast
steps.content: The sentence says copies circulated in secret despite what the government tried to do. The blank must therefore describe an attempt to stop or restrict the novel's spread.

steps.title: Choose the restrictive verb
steps.content: Choice A means copy, Choice B suggests bringing something in, and Choice D means evaluate critically. None explains why copies would circulate secretly. A verb meaning prevent distribution fits the contrast. The answer is C.
